name: Fastighets AB Balder (publ)
summary: Fastighets AB Balder (publ) develops, owns, and manages residential and commercial properties, and hotels in Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Norway, Germany, and the United Kingdom. The company's property portfolio comprises commercial properties, such as commerce, industrial/warehouse, office, restaurant, and education/health properties, as well as shops and garages; and parking spaces. As of December 31, 2020, it owned 1,362 investment properties with a lettable area of 4,502,000 square meters. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.
